title.zh: 面部按摩美容：中医手法让容颜焕发
title.en: Facial Massage Beauty: TCM Techniques for Radiant Skin

description.zh: 掌握中医面部按摩的方法，促进面部气血流通，让容颜焕发光彩
description.en: Master TCM facial massage techniques, promote facial Qi-Blood circulation

zh.text: 面部按摩是中医美容的重要方法，通过按摩面部穴位和经络，促进气血流通，改善面部循环，让容颜焕发光彩。坚持面部按摩，可以延缓衰老、淡化皱纹、改善面色。

items: 促进气血流通：改善面部血液循环
淡化皱纹：延缓皮肤衰老
改善面色：让面色红润光泽
消除浮肿：促进水液代谢
舒缓神经：放松面部肌肉
提升轮廓：紧致面部肌肤
四白穴：眼眶下方，美白要穴
迎香穴：鼻翼旁，改善面色
颧髎穴：颧骨下方，淡化色斑
地仓穴：嘴角旁，改善唇色
太阳穴：眼外侧，缓解眼疲劳
攒竹穴：眉头内侧，延缓眼周衰老
鱼腰穴：眉毛中点，改善眉部皱纹
丝竹空穴：眼外侧，缓解眼疲劳
印堂穴：两眉之间，安神定志
百会穴：头顶正中，提升阳气
风池穴：后颈部，舒缓头颈
合谷穴：手背虎口，面部总调
推法：用指腹沿经络方向推动
揉法：用指腹轻揉穴位
按法：用指腹按压穴位
抹法：用指腹抹擦面部
拍法：用手掌轻拍面部
第一步：清洁面部，涂抹按摩油
第二步：从下巴向上推至太阳穴
第三步：从鼻旁推至太阳穴
第四步：按揉四白、迎香穴
第五步：按揉太阳、攒竹穴
第六步：轻拍全脸促进循环
第七步：用热毛巾敷脸
眼周皱纹：按揉攒竹、丝竹空
额头皱纹：从眉心向上推
嘴角皱纹：按揉地仓穴
法令纹：从鼻翼向下推
按揉四白穴：美白要穴
按揉颧髎穴：淡化色斑
按揉迎香穴：改善面色
从内向外推：促进气血
从内向外推：促进水液代谢
按揉眼周：消除眼袋
轻拍面部：促进循环
从下巴向上推：提升轮廓
力度适中：不宜过重或过轻
方向正确：顺应经络走向
时间适当：每次10-15分钟
频率适度：每日1-2次
保持清洁：按摩前清洁面部
配合护肤：使用按摩油或面霜
早晨：促进面部气血，焕发精神
睡前：放松面部，促进睡眠
洗脸后：配合护肤产品
疲劳时：舒缓面部肌肉

zh.text: 温馨提示：面部按摩需要长期坚持才能见效。皮肤有炎症或伤口时不宜按摩。建议配合内调，内外兼修效果更佳。

en.text: Facial massage is an important TCM beauty method. By massaging facial acupoints and meridians, it promotes Qi-Blood circulation, improves facial blood flow, and makes skin radiant. Consistent facial massage can delay aging, fade wrinkles, and improve complexion.

items: Promotes Qi-Blood circulation: Improves facial blood flow
Fades wrinkles: Delays skin aging
Improves complexion: Makes face rosy and glowing
Eliminates puffiness: Promotes fluid metabolism
Relaxes nerves: Relaxes facial muscles
Defines contour: Tightens facial skin
Sibai: Below eye socket, key whitening point
Yingxiang: Beside nose wing, improves complexion
Quanliao: Below cheekbone, fades spots
Dicang: Beside mouth corner, improves lip color
Taiyang: Outer eye, relieves eye fatigue
Cuanzhu: Inner eyebrow, delays eye area aging
Yuyao: Middle of eyebrow, improves brow wrinkles
Sizhukong: Outer eye, relieves fatigue
Yintang: Between eyebrows, calms spirit
Baihui: Top of head, raises Yang Qi
Fengchi: Back of neck, relaxes head-neck
Hegu: Hand web, overall facial regulation
Pushing: Push along meridian direction with fingertips
Rubbing: Gently rub acupoints with fingertips
Pressing: Press acupoints with fingertips
Wiping: Wipe across face with fingertips
Tapping: Lightly tap face with palm
Step 1: Clean face, apply massage oil
Step 2: Push from chin up to temples
Step 3: Push from nose sides to temples
Step 4: Rub Sibai and Yingxiang points
Step 5: Rub Taiyang and Cuanzhu points
Step 6: Lightly tap entire face
Step 7: Apply warm towel compress
Eye wrinkles: Rub Cuanzhu, Sizhukong
Forehead wrinkles: Push upward from brow center
Mouth corner wrinkles: Rub Dicang point
Laugh lines: Push downward from nose wing
Rub Sibai: Key whitening point
Rub Quanliao: Fades spots
Rub Yingxiang: Improves complexion
Push from inside out: Promotes Qi-Blood
Push from inside out: Promotes fluid metabolism
Rub eye area: Eliminates eye bags
Lightly tap face: Promotes circulation
Push from chin up: Lifts contour
Moderate pressure: Not too heavy or light
Correct direction: Follow meridian direction
Appropriate time: 10-15 minutes each session
Moderate frequency: 1-2 times daily
Keep clean: Clean face before massage
Combine with skincare: Use massage oil or cream
Morning: Promotes facial Qi-Blood, refreshes spirit
Before sleep: Relaxes face, promotes sleep
After washing: Combine with skincare products
When tired: Relaxes facial muscles

en.text: Note: Facial massage requires long-term commitment for results. Avoid massage when skin has inflammation or wounds. Recommend combining with internal regulation for best results.
